zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de RANCON於大約1244年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可時，她的父親Geoffroy V de RANCON40歲，母親Ine Ran41歲。她於大約1255年與Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1302年在法國崔英德-吉洛易沙特-莫-德-圖萊享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de RANCON于大约1244年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可时，她的父亲Geoffroy V de RANCON40岁，母亲Ine Ran41岁。她于大约1255年与Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安藍可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1302年在法国崔英德-吉洛易沙特-莫-德-圖萊享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: RANCON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Lançon): diminutive of Lance ‘lance, spear’, or perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived in a thickly wooded area, or a metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, from Old French lançon ‘branch of a tree’. Compare Lanson .
French (Lançon): habitational name from the town so named, in Bouches-du-Rhône.

variants.name: Lanson
meanings: French: variant of Lançon (see Lancon 1 and 2) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this (or an altered form of Lancon 3). This surname is also found in England, where it is of Huguenot origin.
English: variant of   Langston  , itself probably a variant of   Langton  .

variants.name: Lance
meanings: English: from the ancient Germanic personal name Lanzo, originally a short form of various compound names with the first element land ‘land, territory’ (for example, Lambert ), but later used as an independent name. It was introduced to England by the Normans, for whom it was a popular name among the ruling classes, perhaps partly because of association with Old French lance ‘lance, spear’ (see 2 below).
French: metonymic occupational name for a soldier who carried a lance, or a nickname for a skilled fighter, from Old French lance ‘lance, spear’.
Americanized form of German   Lanz   and   Lenz  .

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de RANCON was born about 1244, in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Geoffroy V de RANCON, was 40 and her mother, Ine Ran, was 41. She married Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE about 1255, in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1302, in Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de RANCON est née environ 1244, à Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Geoffroy V de RANCON, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Ine Ran, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE environ 1255, à Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1302, à Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de RANCON um 1244 in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffroy V de RANCON 40 und ihre Mutter Ine Ran 41. Sie hat um 1255 in Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1302 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de RANCON è nata il circa 1244 nel Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroy V de RANCON, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Ine Ran, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE circa 1255, nel Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1302, nel Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de RANCONが約1244年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンランコンで生まれた時，父Geoffroy V de RANCONは40歳，母Ine Ranは41歳であった。約1255年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンランコンでGuillaume III de SAINTE-MAUREと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1302年にフランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアーサインテ-マアウレ-デ-トウレアインで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de RANCON(이)가 대략 1244년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 랭콘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroy V de RANCON(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ine Ran(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1255년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 랭콘에서 Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1302년 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 세인테-모레-데-토우레이인에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1244–ABT 1302: tany ho any amin'ny 1244–tany ho any amin'ny 1302

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de RANCON nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Geoffroy V de RANCON, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Ine Ran, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE aproximadamente 1255, em Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1302, em Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de RANCON родилась около 1244 г. в местности ранкон, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroy V de RANCON было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Ine Ran, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE около 1255 г. в местности ранкон, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1302 г. в местности сеинте-мауре-де-тоуреаин, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

sm.ABT 1244–ABT 1302: e tusa o le 1244–e tusa o le 1302

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de RANCON nació aproximadamente 1244, en Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Geoffroy V de RANCON, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Ine Ran, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Guillaume III de SAINTE-MAURE aproximadamente 1255, en Rancon, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1302, en Sainte-Maure-de-Touraine, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
